Class Product

java.lang.Object
src.baseobjects.Product
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Product>, AutoGeneratedId<Long>
public class Product extends Object implements AutoGeneratedId<Long>, Comparable<Product>
Represents a product with various attributes such as id, name, coordinates, creation date, price, part number, manufacture cost, unit of measure, and owner. Provides getters and setters with validation for certain fields.

    • getId

      public Long getId()
      Returns the product's id.
      Specified by:
      getId in interface AutoGeneratedId<Long>
      Returns:
      the id

    • setId

      public void setId(long id)
      Sets the product's id.
      Parameters:
      id - the new id (must be > 0 and uniq)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id invalid input: '<'= 0

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the product's name.
      Returns:
      the name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the product's name.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name (must not be null or empty)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is null or empty

    • getCoordinates

      public Coordinates getCoordinates()
      Returns the product's coordinates.
      Returns:
      the coordinates

    • setCoordinates

      public void setCoordinates(Coordinates coordinates)
      Sets the product's coordinates.
      Parameters:
      coordinates - the new coordinates (must not be null)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if coordinates is null

    • getCreationDate

      public LocalDateTime getCreationDate()
      Returns the product's creation date.
      Returns:
      the creation date

    • setCreationDate

      public void setCreationDate(LocalDateTime creationDate)
      Sets the product's creation date.
      Parameters:
      creationDate - the new creation date (must not be null)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if creationDate is null

    • getPrice

      public long getPrice()
      Returns the product's price.
      Returns:
      the price

    • setPrice

      public void setPrice(long price)
      Sets the product's price.
      Parameters:
      price - the new price (must be > 0)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if price invalid input: '<'= 0

      Returns the product's part number.

      public boolean equals(Product p)
